task_completion.description: Open the Nx Witness player and locate the 'Lobby Camera'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nx Witness application window is open, and 'Lobby Camera' is visible in the resource panel or opened in the main viewing grid.

task_completion.description: Play and view the footage from the 'Lobby Camera'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main viewing area of Nx Witness shows active video playback of a mall or lobby area with pedestrians.

task_completion.description: Create or open the traffic analysis report at /home/ga/traffic_report.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window is open showing the file path '/home/ga/traffic_report.txt'.

task_completion.description: Include an estimate of the total number of people in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text inside the report explicitly mentions an estimate of the total number of people or an average number of people per frame.

task_completion.description: Include a description of the traffic patterns (steady vs. fluctuating) in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text inside the report describes the foot traffic pattern, specifically using terms like 'steady', 'fluctuating', or describing the flow over time.

task_completion.description: Include timestamps for the busiest and quietest periods in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text inside the report lists specific timestamps or time ranges corresponding to the 'busiest' (peak) and 'quietest' (lowest) traffic periods.

integrity.description: The agent used the Nx Witness GUI to view the camera footage.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Nx Witness desktop client open and being interacted with, rather than just terminal commands extracting video data.

integrity.description: The agent actually watched the video to gather data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The video player timeline or playback controls should show progress, indicating the video was played and not just opened.

integrity.description: The agent wrote the report based on observation rather than echoing a hardcoded string.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report should be visible in a text editor or terminal being actively written or saved, and the contents should reflect genuine analysis of the video.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target camera is named 'Lobby Camera' and plays the 'mall_pedestrian.mp4' video. The final report must be saved exactly to '/home/ga/traffic_report.txt'. The video contains approximately 62,315 total head annotations across 2000 frames (averaging ~31 people per frame). A highly accurate total estimate will be in the tens of thousands, or note an average of ~30-35 people per frame.
